prompt: Create a 3D game asset for a fantasy RPG: a rugged, metallic wristband artifact. Use the glowing runic enchantment concept from image 1 and the heavy-duty weathered metal and leather aesthetic from the watch in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D render of a rugged, metallic wristband artifact, suitable as a game asset for a fantasy RPG. The wristband should incorporate a glowing, golden runic enchantment, similar in style to the glowing Elvish script on the ring in image 1. The metallic body of the wristband should have a heavy-duty, weathered bronze or brass appearance, and it should feature a dark, worn brown leather strap, drawing inspiration from the watch in image 2.
